title: Nether 1 to 1
description: Changed the coordinate scale of the Nether to be 1:1 overworld.
body:
A simple datapack for all modern versions of Minecraft that changes the nether-overworld coordinate scale from 8:1 to 1:1

If you want to change this coordinate scale to whatever number you'd like, just go to \
`NetherRatio_X/data/minecraft/dimension_type/the_nether.json `\
and change it there. The default (vanilla) is 8.
